prompt: Buatkan caption Instagram untuk brand skincare lokal bernama 'GlowNesia'. Produknya serum vitamin C 15% yang bisa mencerahkan wajah dalam 14 hari. Target audiensnya perempuan umur 20-30 tahun, urban, aktif di sosmed. Harga 89 ribu, lagi promo gratis ongkir hari ini aja.
assertions: Output is primarily written in Bahasa Indonesia
Contains at least 2 distinct copy variations
Highlights a specific product benefit related to brightening/mencerahkan (not just listing the vitamin C feature)
Uses casual/informal register appropriate for Gen Z audience (no 'Anda', uses conversational tone)
Mentions the price point (89 ribu or 89.000 or 89rb or equivalent)
Includes urgency element tied to the promo (hari ini/sekarang/terbatas or similar)
